tools.description: AI tool for contractors to generate accurate cost estimates, analyze bid documents, and reduce bidding risk.

tools.description: Uses AI to generate polished presentations from text prompts, complete with layouts, images, and data visualizations.

tools.description: Conversational AI assistant capable of writing, analysis, coding, research, and more. The dominant general-purpose AI tool.

tools.description: Known for strong reasoning, long-context document analysis, and nuanced writing. Popular for research and professional writing.

tools.description: AI tool for fiction writers offering story planning, character development, prose generation, and revision tools.
